name: vite-plugin-federation
description: A Vite plugin for Module Federation.

scripts.test:e2e: pnpm build && node ../../scripts/e2e-port-preflight.mjs REACT_REMOTE REACT_HOST && playwright test --config playwright.config.ts && pnpm test:e2e:compat && pnpm test:e2e:shared && pnpm test:e2e:dts:dev
scripts.test:e2e:browser-matrix: pnpm build && pnpm --filter example-react-remote build && pnpm --filter example-lit-remote build && pnpm --filter example-multi-remote-host build && node ../../scripts/e2e-port-preflight.mjs REACT_REMOTE LIT_REMOTE MULTI_REMOTE_HOST && playwright test --config playwright.browser-matrix.config.ts
scripts.test:e2e:compat: pnpm build && pnpm --filter example-react-remote build && pnpm --filter example-webpack-systemjs-remote build && pnpm --filter example-originjs-compat-host build && node ../../scripts/e2e-port-preflight.mjs REACT_REMOTE WEBPACK_SYSTEM_REMOTE ORIGINJS_HOST && playwright test --config playwright.compat.config.ts
scripts.test:e2e:multi-remote: pnpm build && pnpm --filter example-react-remote build && pnpm --filter example-lit-remote build && pnpm --filter example-multi-remote-host build && node ../../scripts/e2e-port-preflight.mjs REACT_REMOTE LIT_REMOTE MULTI_REMOTE_HOST && playwright test --config playwright.multi-remote.config.ts
scripts.test:e2e:shared: pnpm build && pnpm --filter example-shared-strict-fallback-app build && pnpm --filter example-shared-host-only-remote build && pnpm --filter example-shared-host-only-host build && pnpm --filter example-shared-negotiation-remote build && pnpm --filter example-shared-negotiation-host build && pnpm --filter example-workspace-shared-remote build && pnpm --filter example-workspace-shared-host build && node ../../scripts/e2e-port-preflight.mjs SHARED_STRICT_FALLBACK SHARED_HOST_ONLY_REMOTE SHARED_HOST_ONLY_HOST SHARED_NEGOTIATION_LOADED_HOST SHARED_NEGOTIATION_LOADED_REMOTE SHARED_NEGOTIATION_VERSION_HOST SHARED_NEGOTIATION_VERSION_REMOTE WORKSPACE_SHARED_REMOTE WORKSPACE_SHARED_HOST && playwright test --config playwright.shared.config.ts
scripts.test:e2e:ssr: pnpm build && pnpm --filter example-react-remote build && pnpm --filter example-react-ssr-host build && node ../../scripts/e2e-port-preflight.mjs REACT_REMOTE SSR_HOST && playwright test --config playwright.ssr.config.ts
